title: Learning from Home: The New Way of Study
passage:
Learning from Home

Today, millions of students do not go to a school building every day. Instead, they study at home. This is called online learning or distance education. To study online, a student needs three important things. They need a computer, a fast internet connection, and a quiet room. Many students around the world now use this new way of learning every week.

Online learning is very popular because it is very convenient. Students can choose their own study time. For example, some students like to study early in the morning. Other students prefer to study late in the evening. Also, students do not need to travel to a real school. They do not spend money on bus tickets or fuel for their cars. This saves a lot of time and money for families every day.

However, there are also some problems with learning at home. First, students cannot see their classmates in person. They can only see them on a computer screen. This can make some students feel very lonely. Second, it is easy to get distracted at home. For example, students might watch television or play video games instead of doing their homework. Therefore, students must work hard and focus on their lessons.

Teachers also have to work in a different way. They make video lessons and send homework through email. They can talk to students using video calls on the computer. Many teachers say that online learning is good, but they still want to see their students in a real classroom again. They think a mix of both ways is best for the future.

In the future, online learning will become even more common. More schools will offer online classes for children and adults. People can learn new skills from their homes at any age. It is a big change in education.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What three things does an online student need?

options.A: A computer, fast internet, and a quiet room.
options.B: A television, a book, and a big desk.
options.C: A car, a bus ticket, and a computer.
options.D: A phone, a notebook, and a classroom.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 1 says: 'They need a computer, a fast internet connection, and a quiet room.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 says: 'Online learning is very popular because it is very convenient.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: How do students see their classmates in online learning?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 says: 'They can only see them on a computer screen.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: How do teachers send homework to students?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 says: 'They make video lessons and send homework through email.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Some students prefer to study late in the evening.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Other students prefer to study late in the evening.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Online learning is more expensive than going to a real school.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states that students 'do not spend money on bus tickets or fuel... This saves a lot of time and money', meaning it is cheaper, not more expensive.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Students might get distracted by playing video games.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'students might watch television or play video games instead of doing their homework.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Most online students live in the United Kingdom.
questions.explanation: The text only mentions 'Many students around the world' but does not mention the United Kingdom.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: To study online, a student needs a computer, a fast internet connection, and a _______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 1 states: 'They need a computer, a fast internet connection, and a quiet room.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Students do not need to travel to a _______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Also, students do not need to travel to a real school.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Teachers talk to students using _______ on the computer.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'They can talk to students using video calls on the computer.'

vocabulary.meaning: easy to do, useful, and saving time (tiện lợi)
not paying attention to what you should be doing (bị xao nhãng)
physically meeting someone, not online (trực tiếp)
abilities to do something well because of practice (kỹ năng)

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài đạt điểm cao (A1-A2)

1. Tìm từ khóa giống hệt: Đối với trình độ A1-A2, các câu hỏi thường sử dụng từ ngữ giống hệt trong bài đọc. Hãy tìm các từ như 'computer', 'travel', 'distracted' trong bài để xác định vị trí câu trả lời.

2. Đọc kỹ yêu cầu số lượng từ: Đề bài yêu cầu 'NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS' (Không quá 2 từ). Nếu bạn viết 3 từ, câu trả lời sẽ bị tính là sai ngay cả khi có ý đúng.

3. Phân biệt False và Not Given: Nếu bài viết nói ngược lại với câu hỏi, chọn FALSE. Nếu bài viết hoàn toàn không nhắc đến thông tin đó (ví dụ: 'United Kingdom'), chọn NOT GIVEN.
